title: FCDO statement on DPRK ballistic missile launches: 22 October
body: "An FCDO spokesperson said:  “North Korea’s ballistic missile launches on 22 October are another breach of multiple UN Security Council resolutions (UNSCRs). Unlawful ballistic missile launches continue to destabilise the peace and security of the Korean Peninsula.  The UK strongly urges North Korea to stop such provocations, to engage in meaningful diplomacy and accept offers of dialogue.”   Media enquiries     Email newsdesk@fcdo.gov.uk     Telephone 020 7008 3100    Email the FCDO Newsdesk (monitored 24 hours a day) in the first instance, and we will respond as soon as possible.   "
